message: Stage-2 boxed extraction on exp_009 missing_boxed responses. 70/190 public rescued (37%); 23 correct (33% hit rate).
Stage-2 rescue with max_tokens 2048→4096. Rescue rate jumped 37%→56%; +13 net correct (+11 MCQ, +2 FF). Free-form hypothesis disproved — bottleneck is model capability, not budget.

Stage-2 rescue swapping base Thinking-2507 rescuer → GRPO strict70. MCQ +1.33pp local, free-form −0.13pp (0 net free-form gains). All 78 missing_boxed are truncation — GRPO generates 2-4x longer chains. Free-form rescue confirmed saturated. New best.

Single-variable swap: stage-1 model exp_009 GRPO → exp_017 pass-2 GRPO. Rescue stack identical to exp_014. Pass-2 stage-1 lift (+0.89pp local) compounded perfectly through rescue layer. MCQ +1.34pp, FF +0.66pp local. Kaggle gain ~2x local gain — pass-2 generalizes better to private than public. Public rescue 113/181 (62%), private 92/187 (49%). New best.
pass-3 MCQ + pass-2 FF + strict70 rescue (calibration fix for pass-3 FF over-confidence diagnosed in exp_021)

Pass-4 stage-1 (0.600 board) + exp_018 strict70 rescue stack, single-variable swap. Board 0.621 = within noise of exp_018 (~0.3sigma); does NOT beat it. exp_018 stays best. KEY: pass-4 stage-1 gain did NOT compound through rescue — rescue lift halved (+0.021 vs pass-2 +0.042); stage-1 and rescue are non-additive. Local 62.26% (best ever) INVERTED vs board (below exp_018). MCQ rescue +4.0pp local, FF flat (exp_014 saturation). Implication: rescue is tuned to pass-2 residual; re-tune (MCQ-only) to benefit from a better stage-1.

FF-precision prompt on pass-2 stage-1, full public+private. Local +1.51pp overall (+1.59pp FF) but board -1.8pp = regression. Same local↔board inversion as exp_029 (pass-5 GRPO), now extended to prompt-only changes on GRPO bases. STOP per pre-committed gate (≤−0.001 band). Lock exp_018 (0.628) as final. Do NOT layer rescue.

SFT v2 probe gate (recovered via reeval pod) FAILED catastrophically: MCQ -39pp (23%), FF -20pp (33%), boxed extraction -26.5pp (68.5%). Worse than exp_008's -22pp MCQ collapse despite the Thinking-base + MCQ-data-mix fixes. Probe gate caught it at ~3h. Full train not run. exp_034 STOP per pre-committed decision tree. exp_018 (0.628) locked as final.

Post-process judger-extraction fix on exp_018 responses. Strict rule: if [ANS]>=2 AND total_boxes>=N AND current_extract<N, append last-N as contiguous trailing block. Local +0.71pp (8 recoveries, 0 breaks). Kaggle publicLB tie (0.628 -> 0.628); the 37 modified private responses likely fell outside the LB-visible subset. Distribution-free fix; privateScore (revealed 2026-06-01) might lift modestly. Keep as active submission going forward.
